expression: /*Part of Tamtaro SEL Setup*/[]
/*Standard ESE v2.0 [git.tamtaro.de]*/[]

/*Protect Library & Others*/ merge(passthrough(negate(quality(streams, 'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'), library(streams)), 'excluded', 'required', 'limit'), pin(passthrough(message(streams,'includes','🎯 Smart Play'))))

/*SeaDex Duplicates*/ merge(negate(merge(perGroup(seadex(streams, 'best'), 'releaseGroup', 1) , perGroup(negate(seadex(streams,'best'),seadex(streams)), 'releaseGroup', 1)), seadex(streams)), passthrough(seadex(streams), 'excluded') )

/*G's Low Bitrate*/count(negate((isAnime or 'Animation' in genres?bitrate(streams,1,'0.67Mbps'):merge(bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX'),1,'25Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray'),1,'13.6Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'WEB-DL','WEBRip'),1,'4.6Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'HDTV'),1,'11.33Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'),1,'13.6Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray'),1,'6.77Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'WEB-DL','WEBRip'),1,'1.67Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'HDTV'),1,'4.51Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'720p'),'Bluray'),1,'3.43Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'720p'),'WEB-DL','WEBRip'),1,'1.67Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'720p'),'HDTV'),1,'2.28Mbps'),bitrate(streams,1,'0.67Mbps'))),cached(streams)))>10?(isAnime or 'Animation'in genres?bitrate(streams,1,'0.67Mbps'):merge(bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX'),1,'25Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray'),1,'13.6Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'WEB-DL','WEBRip'),1,'4.6Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'HDTV'),1,'11.33Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'),1,'13.6Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray'),1,'6.77Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'WEB-DL','WEBRip'),1,'1.67Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'HDTV'),1,'4.51Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'720p'),'Bluray'),1,'3.43Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'720p'),'WEB-DL','WEBRip'),1,'1.67Mbps'),bitrate(quality(resolution(streams,'720p'),'HDTV'),1,'2.28Mbps'),bitrate(streams,1,'0.67Mbps'))):[]

/*Low Seeders*/count(seeders(merge(type(streams,'p2p'),type(uncached(streams),'debrid')),1))<=5 ?[]: negate(seeders(merge(type(streams,'p2p'),type(uncached(streams),'debrid')),1), merge(type(streams,'p2p'),type(uncached(streams),'debrid')))

/*Bad 4k Anime*/ (isAnime and originalLanguage == 'Japanese' and count(quality(resolution(cached(streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(seadex(resolution(streams, '2160p'))) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(cached(streams), '2160p'), 'BD T1', 'BD T2', 'BD T3', 'BD T4', 'BD T5', 'BD T6', 'BD T7', 'BD T8', 'Remux T1', 'Remux T2', 'Remux T3', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web T4', 'Web T5', 'Web T6')) == 0 )? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), resolution(streams, '2160p')) : []

/*Upscaled 4k*/ (queryType=='movie' or queryType =='series') and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))>=1) and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3', 'DE Web T1', 'DE Web T2', 'DE Web T3', 'DE Web Scene', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web Scene','Asian T1','Asian T2','Asian T3')) == 0? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),resolution(streams,'2160p')):[]

/*Bad 4k Bluray*/ (queryType=='movie' or queryType =='series') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3')) == 0? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'),'2160p')):[]

/*Bad 1080P Bluray*/ (queryType=='movie') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0 and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0) and count(rseMatched(resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'), '1080p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3')) == 0 ? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray')):[]

/*Low SEL Score*/ count(streamExpressionScore(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid'))),-50))<5?[]:streamExpressionScore(negate(merge(library(streams),seadex(streams)),streams),-1000000,-50)
/*RD Copyright (per DMM)*/ service( keyword(streams, 'all', 'web-dl', 'webrip', 'bdrip', 'hdrip', 'dvdrip', 'bluray.x264', 'hdtv.x264', 'hdtv.xvid', 'web.x264', 'web.h264'), 'realdebrid')
/*Ongoing Season‑Pack*/((queryType=='series' or queryType=='anime.series') and ongoingSeason and (daysSinceLastAired <-1 or daysUntilNextEpisode>=0))?seasonPack(streams,'onlySeasons'):[]

/*Info & Other Unwanted*/ merge( type(streams, 'info'),  negate(size(streams,1),type(streams,'debrid','p2p','usenet','stremio-usenet')), releaseGroup(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet'),'sample'), type(keyword(streams, 'all', '-sample'), 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'), message(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet'),'includes','🚫'))

/*Low Quality w/ No Release Group*/ negate(merge( negate(releaseGroup(streams, '1', 'bit', '1080p','DLRip'), releaseGroup(streams))), quality(merge(type(streams, 'p2p', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))), 'WEBRip','HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV','HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV','CAM','TS','TC','SCR', 'Unknown'))

/*SELect *3 Q/R Cached Non-Usenet*/ (1*3) !=0 ? negate( merge( perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet'), uncached(streams)), streams), '2160p'), 'quality', (count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3? ceil(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ), perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet'), uncached(streams)), streams), '1440p'), 'quality', 1*3), perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet'), uncached(streams)), streams), '1080p'), 'quality', ((count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray', 'WEB-DL'))<=1*3 or count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '1080p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3) ? ceil(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ), perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet'), uncached(streams)), streams), '720p'), 'quality', ((count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray', 'WEB-DL'))<=1*3 or count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '1080p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3 or count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '720p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3) ? ceil(1.5*3) : (1*3))), perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet'), uncached(streams)), streams), '576p', '480p','360p','240p','144p'), 'quality', 1*3), perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet'), uncached(streams)), streams), 'Unknown'), 'quality', 1*3)), negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet'), uncached(streams)), streams)) : []

/*SELect *3 Q/R Cached Usenet*/ (1*3) !=0 ? negate( merge( perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), type(cached(streams),'usenet','stremio-usenet')), '2160p'), 'quality', (count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3? ceil(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ), perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), type(cached(streams),'usenet','stremio-usenet')), '1440p'), 'quality', 1*3), perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), type(cached(streams),'usenet','stremio-usenet')), '1080p'), 'quality', ((count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray', 'WEB-DL'))<=1*3 or count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '1080p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3) ? ceil(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ), perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), type(cached(streams),'usenet','stremio-usenet')), '720p'), 'quality', ((count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray', 'WEB-DL'))<=1*3 or count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '1080p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3 or count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '720p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3) ? ceil(1.5*3) : (1*3))), perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), type(cached(streams),'usenet','stremio-usenet')), '576p', '480p','360p','240p','144p'), 'quality', 1*3), perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), type(cached(streams),'usenet','stremio-usenet')), 'Unknown'), 'quality', 1*3)), negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), type(cached(streams),'usenet','stremio-usenet'))) : []

/*SELect *3 Q/R Uncached*/ (1*3) !=0 ? negate( merge( perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), '2160p'), 'quality', (count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), uncached(streams)), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3? ceil(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ), perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), '1440p'), 'quality', 1*3), perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), '1080p'), 'quality', ((count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), uncached(streams)), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray', 'WEB-DL'))<=1*3 or count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), uncached(streams)), '1080p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3) ? ceil(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ), perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), '720p'), 'quality', ((count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), uncached(streams)), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray', 'WEB-DL'))<=1*3 or count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), uncached(streams)), '1080p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3) ? ceil(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ), perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), '576p', '480p','360p','240p','144p'), 'quality', 1*3), perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), 'Unknown'), 'quality', 1*3)), negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams))) : []

/*Final Q SELection*/ isAnime? ((count(quality(seadex(streams),'HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV'))==0 and count(perGroup(resolution(merge(type(streams,'p2p','http','live','usenet','stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'),'quality',1,'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL'))>=1) ?  quality(streams,'HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV','CAM','TS','TC','SCR'): ((count(quality(seadex(streams),'HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV'))>=1 or count(perGroup(resolution(merge(type(streams,'p2p','http','live','usenet','stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'),'quality',1,'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL','WEBRip','HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV'))>2)? quality(streams,'CAM','TS','TC','SCR') : [] )): (count(rseMatched(quality(streams, 'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3', 'DE Web T1', 'DE Web T2', 'DE Web T3', 'DE Web Scene', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web Scene','Asian T1','Asian T2','Asian T3'))>=1 or count(perGroup(resolution(merge(type(streams,'p2p','http','live','usenet','stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'),'quality',1,'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL'))>=1) ?  quality(streams,'HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV','CAM','TS','TC','SCR','Unknown'): ((count(perGroup(resolution(merge(type(streams,'p2p','http','live','usenet','stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'),'quality',1,'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL','WEBRip','HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV'))>2)? quality(streams,'CAM','TS','TC','SCR') : [] )

/*Final R SELection*/ merge(count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p')) >= min(3*3, 15)? merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'),resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'), type(cached(streams),'debrid')), '720p','576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown')):count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p')) >= min(1.5*3, 8)? merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'),slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'), type(cached(streams),'debrid')), '720p'), 2*3),resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'), type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown')):count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p')) > 0? merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'),resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'), type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown')):count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p')) >= min(2.5*3, 12)? merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'),resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'), type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown')):count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p')) >= min(1.5*3, 6)? merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'),slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'), type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'567','480','Unknown'), 2*3),resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'), type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'360p','240p','144p')):count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p')) >0? merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'),resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'), type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'360p','240p','144p')):count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p','576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown')) >0? merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid')): [])
